events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: pressure testing in progress, instruments not isolated before hydro. ASME B31.3 §345 requires instruments not subject to test be removed or isolated. This is a sequence violation. Fail, high risk. Need to stop, isolate instruments before continuing.

  "findings": [
    "Instruments not isolated before hydrostatic test, exposing gauges/transmitters to test pressure and possible damage",
    "Sequence violation: pressure test started without isolating or removing instruments not designed to withstand test pressure"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop the hydrostatic test immediately",
    "Depressurize the system to a safe condition",
    "Isolate or remove instruments not subject to test per ASME B31.3 §345",
    "Verify isolation/blinds are correctly installed before re-pressurizing",
    "Re-inspect setup and resume test only after instruments are protected"
  ],
  "rationale": "ASME B31.3 §345 requires that equipment/instruments not included in the pressure test be disconnected or isolated. Starting hydro with instruments live is a non-compliant sequence violation and risks instrument damage and inaccurate/unsafe test conditions.",
